title: be going to (do)
desc: 계획된 의도 또는 근거 있는 예측
examples: Of course just my luck it's raining but I'm not going to let the weather get me down.
Kind of like candle wax. We're eating very healthy tonight. It's a PJ party. We've got our feast ready and now we're going to watch a movie and stuff our faces. Everything looks so delicious.
Fuukoma. I'm going to sleep now everyone. Good night and see you in the morning.

title: will / shall
examples: After the Sokcho eye we came back to the hotel and rested a bit and now we are on the rooftop of our hotel. It's a bit luxurious because they have an infinity pool so you can see a gorgeous view well you swim. The water is actually really warm. It feels like bath water so I love it so much.
We're gonna swim and they have a hot tub as well so we'll relax in the hot tub too.

title: can / could / be able to
examples: We got a sausage and rice cake skewer which I've never tried before but I know it's super popular at rest stops in Korea so I'm pretty excited to try it out. I also got potatoes. This is my favorite dish at the rest stop. It never disappoints me. I love rice cakes because their texture is so unique. It's so squishy. I love it. I love how these potatoes are a little bit crispy on the outside but soft on the inside and lightly salted but I know it's untraditional but I always have to have ketchup with these potatoes. This is for sure without a doubt my go-to snack at the rest stop. We've got our leftover food some ice coffee and now it's time to hit the road because I want to check in early so we can fully enjoy the hotel. We need to fill up our tank so we're pulling up to a gas pump. It's so friendly.

We checked in to our hotel and I am so happy with it. The view is incredible. We can see the lake. We can see the sea. It's amazing but first things first every time I go to a hotel I always have to check the bed first. All right give it the jump test.
I can definitely see why this is a delicacy here. It is so delicious in refreshing on a scorching hot day like today. Wow. I gotta work on my tan. I'm as white as a ghost.
I love seeing the bird's eye view of the beach. You can see the different shades of blue in the water. It is just absolutely breathtaking here. It's so romantic.

After the Sokcho eye we came back to the hotel and rested a bit and now we are on the rooftop of our hotel. It's a bit luxurious because they have an infinity pool so you can see a gorgeous view well you swim. The water is actually really warm. It feels like bath water so I love it so much.

I know you're not supposed to eat too much before swimming but we were hungry. We've got a jumbo-sized buckwheat pancake, some pork, and some buckwheat noodles. I heard that Maguksu or cold buckwheat noodles are the local delicacy in Sokcho so we have to have at least one bowl while we're here.

I'm just in denial that it's not my birthday anymore and we're leaving today. How can I leave when the weather is so gorgeous? I had to get in one last swim in the pool this morning and we had a photo shoot. Let's jump in the water before we head out.

title: have something done
examples: This is instability so let me take a picture first. I don't usually have a big sweet tooth but ice cream is my guilty pleasure and honeycomb is something I've never tried before so kind of want to try that first. No let me try the ice cream first. It's the perfect summer treats. I like that the honey gets a little bit hard from the cold ice cream. Wow that's an interesting texture.
